name: Echo of the Unmade
description: A hollow fragment of the Void Knight's armor. It still hums with the ghost of an order it could not disobey.
flavour: Something in it recognizes those who carry burdens they did not choose.
bonusText: SPD +12% · First strike chance in battle

name: Cinder of Ashveil
description: A coal-black shard from the Demon Lord's chest, where the Fire Fragment burned. It is warm to the touch and will never cool.
flavour: Fire that remembers what it destroyed does not stop burning.

name: Scorched Core
description: A fused knot of stone and heat pulled from the Ember Wastes boss. It has never stopped being warm.
flavour: Some things burn so long they forget they were ever anything else.

name: Drowned Sigil
description: A barnacled crest torn from the Kraken's hide. It holds the memory of a tide that swallowed an entire coast.
flavour: The sea does not mourn what it takes. It simply keeps it.

name: Tarnished Wing
description: A single feather from the Fallen Angel Commander — scorched at the edges, still bearing a seal that does not belong to them.
flavour: The seal is not the commander's. Someone gave the order. Someone wanted them there.

name: Void Crown Shard
description: A fragment of Valdris's crown, cracked in the first moment he doubted himself. It predates the war by centuries.
flavour: Even emperors are afraid of something.

name: Shattered Horizon
description: Glass from the edge of the Void Citadel where sky and nothing meet. Weightless. Colder than it should be.
flavour: There are places where the world simply stops. This came from one of them.

name: Rampart Oath
description: A stone oath-tablet from the fortress ramparts, carved by soldiers who knew they would not hold the line.
flavour: They held it anyway. That is what the tablet is for.
bonusText: DEF +18% · Once per battle: one fallen ally revives at 1 HP

name: Last Light of Aethoria
description: The final pulse of a world that refused to die quietly. It weighs nothing and everything at once.
flavour: Carry it. That is all it asks.

name: Ashen Shard
description: A piece of scorched stone from the ruins. Faintly warm. Someone carved a name into it that is no longer readable.

name: Cracked Talisman
description: A protective charm split down the middle. Half the ward still holds.
flavour: Half a protection is better than none. Probably.

name: Ember Token
description: A coin-sized disc that never goes cold. Soldiers used to carry them in winter campaigns.
flavour: Warmth kept people alive long before weapons did.

name: Tide Remembrance
description: A vial of water from a spring that no longer exists. Sealed with wax. No one has opened it.
flavour: Some things are worth preserving even when the world that made them is gone.

name: Warden's Chain
description: A length of chain worn smooth by two thousand years of use. Too heavy for most. The warden carries it like it weighs nothing.
flavour: Some burdens become so familiar they stop feeling like weight.

name: Summoner's Thread
description: A cord woven from eidolon hair, given freely. It hums faintly when held near anyone with magical ability.
flavour: The creatures gave what they could. That is what loyalty looks like.
